title: I've tried most AI plugins. Here's why they mostly disappoint

posts.cooked: Most AI plugins feel grafted onto Obsidian rather than integrated into it. They interrupt the writing flow instead of supporting it. The capable models are cloud-based, which makes privacy a dealbreaker for many users.
The main issue is that AI in PKM often replaces the cognitive work instead of supporting it. Generic summaries and obvious links do not create understanding.
